title: Descendant's Weaponry
description: This mod adds new types of weapons and armor :vvvvvvvvv
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b51c6dff1f9f61e22bb02135684c906dcff8d286.png)

Discord      CurseForge

# Description Descendant's Weaponry is a mod that adds new types of weapons, currently has 20 melee weapons of all vanilla materials (wood, stone, gold, gold, iron, diamond and netherite), heavy crossbows and crossbows from tier gold and up (gold, iron, diamond, netherite), 2 new types of armor, heavy and samurai, this allows you to choose according to your tastes or needs. English is not my native language, all this was translated thanks to DeepL. - It probably has some errors in the textures or properties of the weapons, I'm clumsy.

Highly recommended to play with

### Types of melee weapons | Diamond Equipment | Attack Damage | Reach | Attack Speed | Cost | Efficiency | |:-----------------:|:-------------:|:-----:|:------------:|:----:|:----------:| | Dagger | 6 | -0.5 | 1.9 | 1 | - | | Longsword | 8.5 | +0.5 | 1.2 | 4 | - | | Katana | 7 | - | 1.8 | 3 | - | | Khopesh | 7.5 | +0.5 | 1.7 | 3 | - | | Rapier | 3.5 | +0.5 | 2.1 | 4 | - | | Cutlass | 7 | +0.5 | 1.8 | 4 | - | | Battleaxe | 12 | - | 0.7 | 6 | - | | Greatpickaxe | 8 | +0.5 | 1 | 6 | Moderate+ | | Sickle | 7 | - | 1.6 | 3 | Moderate | | Kama | 8 | - | 1.6 | 3 | Low | | Greatsword | 10 | +1 | 1 | 5 | - | | Zweihänder | 11.5 | +1 | 0.85 | 7 | - | | Flammenschwert | 11 | +1 | 0.9 | 7 | - | | Buster Sword | 13 | +1 | 0.6 | 7 | - | | Scythe | 9.5 | +1.5 | 1.1 | 5 | Moderate | | Spear | 6.5 | +1.5 | 1.4 | 1 | - | | Glaive | 8.5 | +1.5 | 1.3 | 4 | - | | Halberd | 11 | +1.5 | 0.8 | 5 | - | | Trident | 9 | +1.5 | 1.1 | 5 | - | | Pike | 6.5 | +2 | 1.15 | 1 | - | ### 🎯 Ranged Weapons - **Crossbow** (gold, iron, diamond and netherite) - **Heavy crossbow** (gold, iron, diamond and netherite) ### 🛡️ Armor Types - **Heavy** (gold, iron, diamond and netherite) - **Samurai** (gold, iron, diamond and netherite) ### 🔨 Reinforced Material Recipes (Smithing Table) I show these recipes because for some reason JEI does not do it when a smithing table recipe is not complete, for example my recipe only covers 2 of the 3 spaces on the table, fortunately this does not happen with other alternatives like EMI and REI. ![Reinforced iron ingot recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3104447037d20608de6c3157c9d344b2310c2dbb.png) ![Reinforced golden ingot recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3797b8e4190b9d971848a2ded5825c2239c6e76f.png) ![Reinforced diamond recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4d327a2bfcd352f8d962dff6bf7c36fe6371a38.png) ![Reinforced netherite ingot recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4826f4c2ec87e5edf40917d2a567b81166d1e77a.png) ## 🔗 Mod Compatibility - This mod has compatibility with: > [Enlightend](https://modrinth.com/mod/enlightend) > > [Deeper Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeper_caves) > > [Oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized) > > [Better Gold Stuff](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-gold-stuff) - Bringing weapons with their respective materials with the exception of armor. ## 🧩 Suggested Mods - For a better experience I highly recommend that you use the following mods: > [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) > > [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) ## 🗺️ Planned Features - Unique properties of weapons - More compatibility with other mods - Backports for 1.19.2 and 1.18.2
